If You Want A Bestseller
▪ 	Hitting the bestseller list comes down to focusing all your
book sales into a specific period of time
▪ 	The rules are murky, and they change constantly
▪ 	For Amazon…it’s about focusing within a single day (or
less). Be sure to get a screen shot!
▪ 	For NY Times, it’s about sales within one week
